perturbation.original_text: Terms used in this certificate have the meanings given to them in the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, unless otherwise defined herein.
perturbation.changed_text: Terms used in this certificate have the meanings given to them in the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, and as defined according to the Agent's discretion.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces a contradiction by stating that terms can be defined at the Agent's discretion, which conflicts with the earlier part of the sentence which states the terms are defined as per the Agency Agreement, creating ambiguity and uncertainty about the precise definitions to be used. This could lead to disputes over interpretation.
perturbation.location: End of document, before signature block
perturbation.contradicted_location: End of document, before signature block
perturbation.contradicted_text: Terms used in this certificate have the meanings given to them in the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, and as defined according to the Agent's discretion. Dated this day of , 2015. [INSERT NAME OF AGENT] [INSERT NAME OF U.S. AFFILIATE] By: By: Name: Name: Title: Title:
perturbation.justification: The changed text adds 'and as defined according to the Agent's discretion' which directly contradicts the first part of the sentence that states terms are defined in the Agency Agreement. This creates ambiguity and uncertainty, especially since the contradicted text is the same sentence as the changed text, creating a clear and present in-text contradiction based on the definition of Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction because the same clause is located in multiple locations with conflicting implications, leading to uncertainty about which definition to use.

perturbation.original_text: (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us largely in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, but we reserve the right to deviate as needed.
perturbation.explanation: This edit adds "largely" and "but we reserve the right to deviate as needed," directly contradicting the original statement that the offering was conducted *in accordance with* the terms of the Agency Agreement. This change permits unspecified deviations, introducing uncertainty and potentially undermining the enforceability of the agreement's terms.
perturbation.contradicted_text: (viii) the offering of the Securities in the United States has been conducted by us largely in accordance with the terms of the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, but we reserve the right to deviate as needed. [REMAINDER OF PAGE INTENTIONALLY LEFT BLANK] Terms used in this certificate have the meanings given to them in the Agency Agreement, including Schedule A attached hereto, unless otherwise defined herein.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a clear contradiction. The original text states the offering was conducted 'in accordance with' the Agency Agreement, while the changed text states it was conducted 'largely in accordance with' and reserves the right to 'deviate as needed.' This directly conflicts with the requirement for adherence to the agreement's terms, creating uncertainty about which terms are binding and potentially undermining the enforceability of the agreement. As this falls under structural flaws, where a clause is placed in multiple locations with conflicting implications, it creates uncertainty about the obligations and rights of each party.
